name: Kokeshimon

signature_move.name: DanmakuEnju
signature_move.description: Fires a volley of telekinetic bullets from the base of itskokeshiarms.

description: A Puppet Digimon that evolved by taking in data from a " Kokeshi ", a traditional Japanese doll. It lives in abandoned castles and mansions scattered across the Eastern Digital World . Although it is usually quiet, and spends its time standing still like an ornament, there are times when it does mischievous things like startling those who unwittingly draw near. However, it has caring side too where it will try to protect Baby and Child Digimon, and is also a Digimon that one can become good friends with, provided they build a trustful relationship with it. It has the ability to use telekinesis, and emits psychic waves from the base of its body while moving. Because it moves around lightly like a ghost, it is difficult to notice Kokeshimon as it silently draws near. Its Special Moves are firing a volley of telekinetic bullets from the base of its kokeshi arms ( Danmaku Enju ), and generating a telekinetic shockwave by landing on the ground from a flying posture with great force, temporarily incapacitating anyone it comes into contact with ( Kideko no Isukumi ).
